name: Multitalker Parakeet Streaming 0.6b-v1 Buffer Interval Sweep on gold-92
short_description: Per-clip streaming buffer interval sweep predictions for multitalker-parakeet-streaming-0.6b-v1 on gold-92 (93 clips), testing 500ms, 750ms, and 1000ms extraction intervals. Model has internal VAD for segment boundaries.
model_description: nvidia/multitalker-parakeet-streaming-0.6b-v1 (NeMo EncDecMultiTalkerRNNTBPE, 0.6B params) with internal VAD logic and GPU-PB TurboBias attempt. Patched _transcribe_forward for single-speaker mode.
prediction_schema: Each line is a JSON object with fields: clip_id (string), duration_s (float), transcript (string), reference_text (string), is_empty (bool), is_hallucination (bool), ttfd_seconds (float), latency_seconds (float), interval_ms (int), n_chunks (int), n_inferences (int), model_has_internal_vad (bool).

files.description: Per-clip predictions at 500ms buffer extraction interval (93 clips)
Per-clip predictions at 750ms buffer extraction interval (93 clips)
Per-clip predictions at 1000ms buffer extraction interval (93 clips)
